notes: 6.6: PDF translation no longer dies mid-run downloading fonts (RetryError[ReadTimeout] on networks where github/HF are unreachable) — the PDF plugin now pre-downloads ALL BabelDOC assets (layout model + fonts + CMaps) at install time, visibly and retryably; a drop-in offline font pack (models/babeldoc/assets/) restores assets with zero network; the downloadable PDF model pack (pdf.zip) now includes the previously-missing CMaps. / 6.6：修复 PDF 翻译中途下载字体失败导致整个任务报错（github/HF 不可达网络下的 RetryError 超时）——现在安装 PDF 插件时一次性预下载全部 BabelDOC 资源（版面模型+字体+CMap），失败可见、可重试；离线字体包放入 models/babeldoc/assets/ 即零联网自动补齐；网盘 PDF 模型包（pdf.zip）已补上缺失的 CMap。
